global_scroll.headline: Fed holds benchmark rate steady; signals two cuts possible in 2026 if disinflation resumes
RBI holds repo rate at 6.5%; MPC shifts stance to 'accommodative' on easing inflation
Brent Crude climbs 0.9% on OPEC+ supply discipline signals from Riyadh summit
India-US semiconductor partnership yields first CHIPS Act co-investment in HCL fab project
Global AI capex surges — hyperscalers commit $400B in 2025 data-center buildouts
ECB cuts rates by 25bps; eurozone inflation drops to 2.1%, near target
China's export controls on gallium and germanium tighten global chip supply further
Dollar index softens to 102.3 as Fed pause expectations lift EM capital inflows

daily_pulse.media_headline: NIFTY 50 edges higher as FII inflows return; IT and banking sectors lead gains amid global risk-on mood

opportunities: India's weight in MSCI EM Index rising steadily — passive FII flows to accelerate into large-caps through 2028
Domestic SIP flows crossing ₹25,000 Cr/month mark by 2027 — retail participation structurally re-rating mid-cap indices
PSU capex supercycle (railways, defence, power) driving earnings growth in public-sector stocks through 2029
risks: SEBI tightening F&O margin rules may dampen speculative volumes and short-term index liquidity
Global recession risk from prolonged high US rates could trigger sharp FII reversals in 2025–2026
Concentration risk in Nifty 50 — top 10 stocks represent 57% of weight, amplifying drawdowns

opportunities: GCC headcount in India projected to grow from 1.66M to 2.5M by 2030 — Bengaluru and Hyderabad as primary absorbers
AI-augmented software development tools (GitHub Copilot-class) cutting dev cycle time by 35–40% — boosting IT margin expansion
USD revenue tailwinds for Indian IT as global enterprise cloud migration accelerates into second-wave modernization
risks: US H-1B policy tightening forces onshore staffing cost inflation — eroding offshore arbitrage advantage
Commoditisation of routine coding tasks by LLMs could reduce headcount-dependent revenue models in Tier-2 IT firms
Client budget freezes in BFSI and retail verticals if US slowdown materialises in 2025–2026

opportunities: IndiaAI Mission's ₹10,371 Cr allocation funding sovereign GPU clusters — democratising AI compute access for startups
Agentic AI adoption in BPO and KPO sectors: India positioned to capture $15B incremental AI-services market by 2028
Localized LLM fine-tuning in Indic languages (Hindi, Tamil, Telugu) opening 600M+ vernacular user addressable market
risks: Dependence on NVIDIA H100/H200 imports — export control escalation could delay GPU delivery timelines by 6–18 months
AI talent concentration risk: 80% of AI researchers clustered in Bengaluru and Hyderabad; salary inflation outpacing revenue
Regulatory uncertainty around India's DPDP Act enforcement could stall AI data-pipeline investments

opportunities: India poised to overtake Japan as 4th largest equity market by 2035 — index weight expansion drives sustained passive inflows
Generational wealth transfer from property to financial assets underway — equity mutual fund AUM to cross ₹200 Lakh Cr by 2035
Manufacturing renaissance under PLI 2.0 could add 3–4% to listed corporate earnings CAGR over decade
risks: Climate-related physical risks (extreme heat, erratic monsoons) emerging as systemic threat to agri, power, and infra sectors
Geopolitical fragmentation creating supply-chain bifurcation — India's export markets could shrink if dollar trade-bloc erodes
Ageing demographic dividend turning liability post-2038 without accelerated skilling and productivity gains

opportunities: India-headquartered AI software platforms (not just services) will emerge by 2032 — SaaS-to-PaaS transition creates new export class
Quantum computing infrastructure buildout creating new engineering discipline — India's IIT pipeline well-positioned to lead R&D
Digital public infrastructure (UPI, ONDC, AA framework) becoming global export — ITeS firms building on top of DPI stack
risks: Full agentic automation of software development by 2033–2035 structurally eliminates junior-to-mid engineer headcount tiers
Brain drain acceleration if India-US visa pathways remain constrained — top AI talent migrating permanently
Legacy COBOL/mainframe systems still running in global BFSI — India IT firms carrying technical debt risk as modernisation deadline approaches

opportunities: India's chip design ecosystem (Qualcomm, Intel, AMD design centers) maturing into sovereign IP creation by 2033
AGI-adjacent systems driving India's ₹5 Lakh Cr AI economy target — healthcare, agriculture, and judiciary automation as key verticals
Hyderabad and Chennai emerging as global AI inference data-center hubs leveraging renewable energy and submarine cable access
risks: AGI capability overhang: if general-purpose AI reaches human parity by 2030, entire knowledge-worker economy requires structural redesign
Chip sovereignty gap — India lacks domestic foundry capability below 28nm; TSMC dependency a single-point geopolitical failure
AI-driven misinformation at scale could destabilise retail investor sentiment and regulatory trust in financial markets
